summary: End-to-end testing of Euro Mobile & Computer landing page completed. Backend (5/5 pytest passing) and frontend (all critical flows working: page load, anchor nav scroll, form validation toast, successful form submission with persistence to MongoDB) verified.

issues: 'Contact' nav link points to #repair (repair form) rather than a dedicated contact/footer section. Acceptable but could be misleading; consider linking to footer or adding contact details near hero.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown'); migrate to lifespan handlers (FastAPI 0.95+).

POST /api/repair-requests has no email format validation (use Pydantic EmailStr) and no length/sanity limits on photos (each up to 4MB on FE × 4 = potential 16MB+ payloads stored as base64 in Mongo). Consider object storage or file size limits server-side.
RepairForm.jsx: client-side email validation is missing (only required check). type='email' on input gives only weak browser validation; backend also doesn't enforce format.
No rate limiting / spam protection on public POST /api/repair-requests — risk for abuse on public landing page.
Navbar 'Contact' anchor points to #repair instead of a contact section/footer; semantic mismatch.
seed_data_creation: Created 3 TEST_ prefixed repair-request records during automated testing (test_repair_requests.py creates 2 and the playwright e2e created 1: TEST_E2E User).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_repair_requests.py covers root, POST /api/repair-requests, GET /api/repair-requests, photos base64, and validation 422. Frontend tested via Playwright: page load, form validation (empty submit shows sonner toast 'Please fill in all required fields' and does NOT submit), successful submission shows [data-testid=repair-success] panel, anchor nav links #services, #how-it-works, #why-us, #repair all scroll correctly. REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://brand-landing-v2.preview.emergentagent.com.
